overview: flowebdesign is a high-converting agency website for Indian local businesses (coaching classes, gyms, cafes). It showcases web design services, demo mockups, and drives leads via WhatsApp and contact forms.
features: High-converting homepage for local businesses (coaching, gyms, cafes)
Hero with WhatsApp and Free Demo CTAs
Static browser-mockup demo previews for 3 business types
Contact section with WhatsApp, phone, and contact form
Admin dashboard with Internet Identity login and contact leads table
Dark glassmorphism design with purple-blue-cyan gradients
